request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news - a small town in our state was targeted by a cyber attack last month. The mayor said they were lucky the new domestic security powers were in place to help local law enforcement respond quickly. Without them, who knows what could have happened? We need to make sure our communities have the tools they need to stay safe. #CommunitySafety #DomesticSecurity
